ham.subject: Out of Office: Alex Thompson will return on 15 April 2026
ham.body:
Hi team,

I am out of the office on vacation from 10 April until 14 April 2026 and will return on 15 April. I will have limited access to email during this period.

If you need assistance with the Q3 budget report, please contact Maria Lopez (maria.lopez@company.com) or copy me on your email so I can forward it to the appropriate department.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
Alex Thompson
Finance Manager

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice #12345 Payment Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Your QuickBooks account has generated a new invoice (#12345) for the month of March 2026. The total amount due is $2,749.00. Please note that failure to settle this invoice within 7 days will result in suspension of your QuickBooks services.

To review and pay your invoice, click the link below:

<URL>

If you have already made the payment, please disregard this notice. Otherwise, we urge you to complete the payment promptly to avoid any interruption.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
QuickBooks Billing Support
